label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set writes LockingInfo column 0 (UID) and returns SUCCESS. The cited LockingInfo table defines column 0 as UID, and the UID section says this column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host, so SUCCESS is not protocol-compliant.
